source_formulae: P0R04943: V. The Integrated Body Matrix (Fascia and Tensegrity)
P0R04944: The Fascia and Extracellular Matrix (ECM) form a continuous, body-wide network.

P0R04945: The Global Tensegrity Scaffold (L3): Fascia provides the mechanical scaffold for the entire organism, operating as a Tensegrity structure. | Information Transmission (L1/L4): Phonon Propagation: Facilitates the propagation of coherent vibrations (phonons) across the body. | Bioelectric Signalling (L3): Fascia possesses piezoelectric properties, transducing mechanical stress into electrical signals, contributing to the global Bioelectric field.
P0R04947: Fig.: From L5 high F to multi-system breakdown: HPA/dysbiosis -> inflammation/BBB -> neuroinflammation -> L1 QEC, L4 sigma -> cognitive decline & depression.

source_formulae: P0R04948: VI. Synthesis: The Holistic Pathology of the SCPN
P0R04949: Pathology is a systemic failure of the SCPN architecture, characterised by the Triad of Pathology:
P0R04950: Decoherence (MS-QEC Failure): Breakdown of the L1 substrate. | Dyscritia (SOC Failure): Deviation from sigma=1. | Dissonance (HPC Failure): Sustained accumulation of Free Energy F.

P0R04951: The Cascading Failure Model: Pathology cascades through the architecture. Example: Chronic Stress (L5 High F) -> HPA activation and Dysbiosis -> Systemic Inflammation and BBB breakdown -> Neuroinflammation -> Disruption of L1 QEC and L4 Criticality -> Cognitive Decline and Depression.
P0R04952: The health of the entire embodied system is essential for the optimal transduction of consciousness.
P0R04954: Fig.: From L5 high F to multi-system breakdown: HPA/dysbiosis -> inflammation/BBB -> neuroinflammation -> L1 QEC, L4 sigma -> cognitive decline & depression.
